- STEP 172: Blue bar is on the right side again (moved back?)

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Inspect current state after LEFT 14 + SPACE
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

# Find blue bar and all colored objects
objects = {}
for n in nodes:
    color = n['color']
    if color not in objects:
        objects[color] = []
    # Get bounding box from boundary
    boundary = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in boundary]
    cols = [p[1] for p in boundary]
    objects[color].append({
        'id': n['id'],
        'hash': n['hash'],
        'pixels': n['pixels'],
        'row_range': (min(rows), max(rows)),
        'col_range': (min(cols), max(cols))
    })

# Print compact summary
for color in sorted(objects.keys()):
    for obj in objects[color]:
        print(f"{color}: rows {obj['row_range']}, cols {obj['col_range']}, pixels={obj['pixels']}, hash={obj['hash']}")

print("\nLast action result:", last_action_result)
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
